reviews.comment:
Espectacular atención  en la YPF en gral .Me atendió Carla con mucha buena onda y me ayudó con un inconveniente con la app de YPF que gracias a su predisposición pude solucionar . Cabe destacar que los baños están muy limpios y  da gusto ir a tomarse un café o almorzar aquí.GRACIAS !!

(Translated by Google)
The service at YPF was spectacular in general. Carla helped me with a very friendly attitude and resolved a problem I had with the YPF app thanks to her helpfulness. It's also worth mentioning that the restrooms are very clean, and it's a pleasure to go there for a coffee or lunch. THANK YOU!!

Esperamos que nos vuelvas a visitar.

saludos
